title: J taku Evangelion 333 Discussion
wikitext:
[]: J-taku Evangelion 3.33 Discussion             Quote Post by TheDrmcvey » Wed Oct 23, 2013 2:48 pm Thought these guys did a great job discussing Eva 3.33. They talked about the positives and negatives of the film in an appropriate manner. Caution: it's over 50 minutes long! http://youtube.com/watch?feature=g-high-u&v=c2gP5FAT3Pc

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Thu Oct 24, 2013 9:45 pm It's decent. But those folks seem really big on the sequel hypothesis... Which makes me want to die.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 24, 2013 10:29 pm monitoradiation wrote: really big on the sequel hypothesis... Which makes me want to die.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Oct 24, 2013 10:34 pm Awww, shit, sequel theory! errbody slit yer writs.

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Thu Oct 24, 2013 11:22 pm Guy Nacks wrote: Awww, shit, sequel theory! errbody slit yer writs.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Oct 25, 2013 10:08 am Well, it was neat listening to it, but there was nothing really interesting going on. Just some people talking about their opinion of the movie. What I really disliked was, that they never stopped hopping from one topic to the other, never sticking with one.
